title: Breach of duty
summary: 9084 Tort — reasonable person standard, Blyth v Birmingham, risk factors.
learningObjectives: Define breach as falling below reasonable standard.
Apply Blyth v Birmingham reasonable person test.
Analyse factors: likelihood, severity, cost of precautions.

simpleExplanation.title: Did they take enough care?
simpleExplanation.summary: Breach occurs when D's conduct falls below what a reasonable person would do — courts weigh risk likelihood, harm severity, and cost of prevention.
steps: Risk factors — Bolton v Stone, Paris v Stepney.
Compliance with statute — not always enough.

sections.content: **Breach of duty** (4.1.3) — balance **risk factors** in problem answers.

sections.label: Mark a breach of duty question
